Apply now and redefine your future!

ADMISSION INTO POSTGRADUATE PROGRAMMES
FOR 2025/2026 ACADEMIC SESSION
Click for Press Release
Download Applicant Manual
Click to Apply
Please note that all TRANSCRIPTS should be forwarded 
under confidential
cover directly to the Secretary, Post-Graduate School, Rivers State University,
Nkpolu-Oroworukwo Port Harcourt.
Applications are invited from suitably qualified candidates for admission
into postgraduate programmes in the Rivers State University,
Nkpolu-Oroworukwo, Port Harcourt for the 2025/2026 academic session.
Click Here
Click Here
Click Here
Candidates offered Provisional Admission
for Year One and Direct Entry for the 2024/2025
Academic Session are informed that the Physical
Clearance Exercise will begin on Monday,
13th January 2025, and will run daily from
9:00 am to 3:00 pm at the Information
Communication Technology (ICTC) Centre
of the University.
Click Here for Press Release
PRE-DEGREE CALENDAR OF ACADEMIC
ACTIVITIES FOR THE 2024/2025 ACADEMIC
SESSION HAS BEEN OFFICIALLY
APPROVED
Click Here for Press Release
For any enquiries,
Call us on +234 810 875 9261 or
+234 902 994 8667.
Our lines are open
Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM.
We’re always here to assist you!
CONVOCATION CHARGES FOR THE 36TH CONVOCATION CEREMONY
Click Here for Press Release
Download Applicant Manual
Click Here to Apply
Convocations Date
--Friday, 13th (Bachelors’ Degrees Convocation)
--Saturday, 14th (Higher Degrees Convocation) December, 2024.
THE ACADEMIC SESSION'S UNDERGRADUATE
CALENDAR FOR 2024/2025 HAS BEEN
OFFICIALLY APPROVED
Click Here to Download Schedule
All candidates who applied to
Rivers State University and participated
in the Post UTME exercise but are yet
to upload their O'level results to JAMB CAPS
are advised to do so within seven days
from the date of this announcement
or risk not being considered for admission.
The deadline for submission of the application online is
Tuesday, December 31st, 2024.
